evals.prompt: Add FAQ schema to our pricing page. We have 5 FAQs about pricing, billing, and cancellation.
evals.expected_output: Should produce a complete FAQPage JSON-LD schema block. Should include all 5 FAQ questions as Question/acceptedAnswer pairs. Should provide the complete script tag with type=application/ld+json. Should note where to add it (head or end of body). Should recommend validating with Google Rich Results Test.
assertions: Includes all questions as proper schema entities
